summary.title: 8-day family adventure to Hunza
summary.headline: A relaxed family loop up the Karakoram Highway to the Hunza Valley.

warnings.text: Carry your CNIC; foreigners may need an NOC for restricted zones near Khunjerab.
Days are cold even in July at altitude — pack warm layers.
ATMs are scarce and unreliable — carry enough cash for the trip.

days.title: Islamabad → Chilas
days.notes: A long first day on the Karakoram Highway. Overnight in Chilas to break the journey.

days.title: Chilas → Karimabad (Hunza)
days.notes: Continue up the KKH, passing Nanga Parbat viewpoints, into the Hunza Valley by evening.

days.title: Forts & old Karimabad
days.notes: Ease into the valley with the two historic forts and a walk through old Karimabad.

days.title: Attabad Lake & Passu
days.notes: A scenic day north — boating on Attabad Lake and photo stops at the Passu Cones.

days.title: Khunjerab Pass day trip
days.notes: Early start for the Pakistan-China border at Khunjerab; catch the Eagle's Nest viewpoint for sunrise or sunset.

days.title: Karimabad → Chilas
days.notes: Begin the return down the KKH, overnighting again in Chilas.

days.title: Chilas → Islamabad
days.notes: The final long drive back to Islamabad. Arrive by evening.

days.title: Buffer / departure
days.notes: A buffer day for rest or to absorb any delay on the mountain roads before heading home.

meta.disclaimer: Costs are estimates stored as ranges — verify current prices before booking.
